privacy.observed_public_peers: globally routable peers from Monad peer-discovery cache
privacy.log_observed_public_peers: globally routable endpoints extracted from live Monad logs
privacy.note: The map uses public RPC DNS, official Monad bootstrap peers, operator-approved public validator endpoints, globally routable observed peer-discovery records, and globally routable live log endpoints. Non-global addresses are intentionally excluded.
